prompt: I uploaded my script to colab with 'colab upload script.py /content/script.py' and it said 'Uploaded' but when I run 'colab exec -f /content/script.py' I get FileNotFoundError. What's wrong?

assertions.text: Explains that colab exec -f reads local files (relative to CWD), not remote VM files
Shows correct command: colab exec -f script.py (without /content/ prefix)
Mentions that working directory on the VM is /content/
Mentions stdin pipe as alternative: echo 'code' | colab exec
